name: odysey-desktop
description: Application desktop locale de lecture PDF adaptee aux besoins dys.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/app.mjs && node --check src/profiles.mjs && node --check src/pdf-processing.mjs && node --check src/core/document/document-storage-key.mjs && node --check src/core/document/annotation-store.mjs && node --check src/core/ocr/ocr-engine.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/reading-guide.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/audio-engine.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/phoneme-reference.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/decoding-engine.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/syllabify-french.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/math-support.mjs && node --check src/core/reading/reading-assist.mjs && node --check src/core/ai/local-llm.mjs && node --check src/core/accessibility/keyboard-nav.mjs && node --check src/core/accessibility/aria-manager.mjs && node --check src/core/support/support-links.mjs && node --check src/core/lexicon/french-lexicon.mjs && node --check src/core/lexicon/local-dictionary.mjs && node tests/syllabify-french.test.mjs && node tests/french-lexicon.test.mjs && node tests/phoneme-reference.test.mjs && node tests/decoding-engine.test.mjs && node tests/math-support.test.mjs && node tests/reading-assist.test.mjs && node tests/local-dictionary.test.mjs && node tests/local-llm.test.mjs && node tests/audio-engine.test.mjs && node tests/profiles.test.mjs
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:installer && npm run build:win:unpacked
